amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 68 e (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 68 e (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

Article 68 e Reporting of breaches and protection of reporting persons Directive (EU) 2019/1937 of the European Parliament and of the Council shall apply to the reporting of breaches of this Regulation and the protection of persons reporting such breaches.
parliament_text: Article 68 e Reporting of breaches and protection of reporting persons Directive (EU) 2019/1937 of the European Parliament and of the Council shall apply to the reporting of breaches of this Regulation and the protection of persons reporting such breaches.
